scripts.build:windows: npm run build --workspace=@suguanki/windows && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('Builds', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/SuguAnki-Setup-1.0.3.exe', 'Builds/SuguAnki-Setup-1.0.3.exe'); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/SuguAnki-1.0.3-win.zip', 'Builds/SuguAnki-1.0.3-win.zip'); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/latest.yml', 'Builds/v1.0.3_latest.yml'); console.log('笨・Windows Builds (.exe, .zip and latest.yml) saved to ./Builds directory');"
scripts.build:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ../../../ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('Builds', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('apps/mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/SuguAnki-1.0.3.apk', 'Builds/SuguAnki-1.0.3.apk'); console.log('笨・Android Build saved to ./Builds directory');"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:windows && npm run build:android
